title: MedRabbits Clinic receives DG Shipping certification for Merchant Navy medical examinations
summary: Certification authorises the clinic to conduct mandatory pre-employment medical fitness assessments for Merchant Navy officers and crew members
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Certification authorises the clinic to conduct mandatory pre-employment medical fitness assessments for Merchant Navy officers and crew members

MedRabbits Clinic, operated by MedRabbits Healthcare, has received certification from the Directorate General of Shipping (DG Shipping), authorising it to conduct mandatory pre-employment medical examinations for Merchant Navy officers and crew members.

With the certification, MedRabbits Clinic is authorised to carry out medical fitness assessments for seafarers in accordance with the standards and guidelines prescribed by DG Shipping. The clinic will provide medical evaluation services required before deployment for maritime professionals.

According to the company, as India’s shipping and maritime sector continues to expand, medical fitness assessments remain a requirement for maintaining safety, operational continuity and regulatory compliance. Merchant Navy personnel work in physically demanding and high-risk environments, often spending extended periods at sea with limited access to medical care. Mandatory pre-employment medical examinations assess physical and mental fitness, reduce the risk of onboard medical emergencies and ensure that crew members meet the health standards required for vessel operations.

The company stated that by adding DG Shipping-certified medical screening services, the clinic aims to support shipping companies, crewing agencies and maritime professionals through medical evaluation services that help streamline deployment while ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.

Suhasini Deshmukh, Co-Founder and Director, MedRabbits Healthcare, said, “Merchant Navy professionals work in highly demanding and regulated environments where medical preparedness and fitness assessments are essential before deployment. Through our DG Shipping certified clinic, our focus is on making the medical evaluation process more accessible, organised, and seamless for seafarers while ensuring high standards of clinical quality, patient convenience, and coordinated healthcare support. As healthcare expectations continue to evolve across specialised sectors, there is a growing need for integrated healthcare ecosystems that combine diagnostics, consultations, preventive care, and patient guidance within a single connected experience.”

Launched in March 2026 in Mumbai, MedRabbits Clinic provides doctor consultations, diagnostics, preventive health assessments, physiotherapy, chronic disease management and coordinated home healthcare support through a clinic-to-home care ecosystem.

According to the company, the clinic brings together medical consultations, diagnostics and patient support services under one roof. It also integrates technology-enabled healthcare coordination with physical clinical infrastructure as part of its healthcare delivery model.
